hypothesis: A homotopy-based refinement that performs unconstrained gradient descent while annealing simulated peak widths (e.g., multiplying Caglioti FWHM parameters by a factor s(t) decreasing from ≥4 to 1) will smooth the XRD loss landscape and produce at least a 50% relative increase in StructureMatcher match rate over fixed-width optimization at lattice-noise σl=0.10 on the MP20 subset used here.
